summary: The diff implements most of the required changes for connecting the backend to /dashboard/client with collapsible cards and task management. REQ-3 backend changes appear partially present (migration.mo and main.mo modifications), and frontend changes in DashboardClient.tsx and useQueries.ts address REQ-4 through REQ-7. However, due to truncation, several acceptance criteria cannot be fully confirmed, and some appear missing or incomplete.

missing_requirements.requirement: createTask (shared) rejects if layanan does not exist or is not active; createTask (shared) rejects if layanan.clientId != msg.caller
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo is truncated and the createTask implementation validating layanan existence, active status, and caller ownership cannot be confirmed in the diff

missing_requirements.requirement: getMyLayanan returns only layanan where clientId == msg.caller
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo is truncated; the getMyLayanan function body filtering by clientId == msg.caller is not visible in the provided diff

missing_requirements.requirement: fetch tasks grouped by status via getTaskByStatus for each status (#review, #revisi, #on_progress, #qa_asistenmu, #selesai) and display in dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: DashboardClient.tsx is truncated. The useQueries.ts file summary mentions useGetMyLayanan and useCreateTask but does not mention a useGetTaskByStatus hook. No hook for getTaskByStatus is visible in the truncated useQueries.ts content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each card displays only tasks matching its status for the logged-in client; Cards reflect live data from the backend
missing_requirements.reason: DashboardClient.tsx is truncated and the five task status card implementations cannot be verified. No getTaskByStatus hook is visible in useQueries.ts, making live data for task status cards unconfirmable.

missing_requirements.requirement: History card is collapsible and placed at the bottom of the dashboard; History card lists recent task-related activity derived from real backend task data
missing_requirements.reason: DashboardClient.tsx is truncated and the History card implementation cannot be confirmed from the visible portion of the diff

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added that converts old Task/Actor shape to new shape during canister upgrades
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not mention adding a migration module. The requirement only asked to update the Task type and createTask function in main.mo, not to introduce a migration.mo file with data migration logic.
